creator: ilgiz@cpok.ru
text:
Sorry for my bad english. Conky can not find Xft.

[kegf@ilgiz /usr/home/kegf/.conky]$ ./conky.sh
Conky: Xft not enabled
Conky: forked to background, pid is 59574

[kegf@ilgiz /usr/home/kegf/.conky]$ pkg_info -xI Xft
libXft-2.1.13       A client-sided font API for X applications

[kegf@ilgiz /usr/home/kegf/.conky]$ pkg_info -xI conky
conky-1.5.1         An advanced, highly configurable system monitor for X
